name: darpa_search
description: Search DARPA opportunities, programs, news, and events stored from darpa.mil monitoring.
description_for_agent: Search DARPA data (opportunities, programs, news, events) scraped from darpa.mil. Use when user asks about DARPA research, programs, funding opportunities, news, or events. Parameters: query (search text), category (optional: opportunities/programs/news/events), limit (max results, default 20).

query.description: Search text to find in DARPA items (titles, body, summary).

category.description: Filter by category: opportunities, programs, news, or events. Leave empty for all.

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return. Default: 20.
